---
title: "HW 5"
author: "Jordan Sutherland"
date: "4/17/2022"
output: word_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## 2

```{r}
yield <- c(785,805,790,793,802)
(mean(yield)-800)/(sd(yield)/sqrt(5))
pt(-1.341104,4,lower.tail=TRUE)
qt(0.05,4,lower.tail=TRUE)
```

## 3

```{r}

```
